title: DeathSpectator (Forge/Fabric/NeoForge)
description: Death system that puts you as a spectator!
body:
![title1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7569365bce4fc6eef1ed34b840c0a324a71842.png)
_Logo by [Kozurat](https://x.com/kozurat)_

This mod consists of a configurable system that allows you to automatically be put into spectator status when you die. It is recommended for Hardcore series or events in which if you die you cannot respawn.

You can customize whether items drop or whether the death message appears, all with the **/deathspectator** command (more on that below).

_The mod is only needed on the server side, but can be used on the client side for singleplayer._

You can identify a similar death system in different [Eufonia Studio](https://x.com/EufoniaStudio) events or series, such as DEDSafio Minecraft and Squid Craft Games 2.

Example taken from a live streamer [elded](https://twitch.tv/elded) in DEDSafio Minecraft 2 (obviously without the on-screen animation, sound or automatic ban):

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vtZk0FsNJck" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
                                                                                  

![title2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01f1bf16988becda5ebb661be43a8e474cde9fb.png)
```
{
  "enabled": true,
  "deathMessage": {
    "enabled": true,
    "message": "%death_message%"
  },
  "inventoryDrop": true,
  "consoleLogs": false,
  "uhcMode": false,
  "titleSubtitle": {
    "enabled": false,
    "title": "&cYou have died",
    "subtitle": "&7You are now in spectator mode",
    "fadeIn": 2,
    "duration": 4,
    "fadeOut": 2
  }
}
```

**Commands:**
- /deathspectator setconfig <propierty> <value> | Set **true** or **false** to configuration file properties.

_**IMPORTANT NOTE:** What is established in the configuration file in the **client** will work for all worlds in singleplayer._

Saving the file and using the command updates properties instantly in the game. If you want to see when the configuration is loaded and reloaded in the client or server console you should set _consoleLogs_ to true.

![title3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a5f887b2a329c3ffc447648dbd23611fae233be.png)
It is not known if the mod can be compatible with another mod that is related to the player's death. Just in case avoid matching them.

![title4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbe488da9f04f8e7778e21497dda5b349c4e3c3e.png)
If you have any problem or suggestion you can report it in the community discord (Spanish-speaking) by opening a ticket: https://discord.gg/sKRYYyVCnw
